name: Pot Roasted Pork
recipeIngredient: 1 cup hot water, more if needed
2 tablespoons cornstarch mixed with 2 tablespoons water
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub the pork roast with salt and pepper.
2. Make slits in the pork and insert garlic slices.
3. Brown the pork roast in a frying pan for 10-15 minutes.
4. To cook in the frying pan: Cook with the other ingredients listed, except cornstarch and water, for 3-4 hours.
5. To cook in a crockpot: Place one slice of onion at the bottom of the pot. Add the browned pork and the remaining ingredients, except cornstarch and water. Cover and cook on Low for 8-10 hours.
6. When done, transfer the roast to a serving platter.
7. Blend the cornstarch with cold water to form a paste.
8. Place the pan or pot back on high heat and pour in the paste.
9. Stir well until thickened.
